memoryArtifacts.headline: William d'Albini or d'Aubigny
memoryArtifacts.description:
«b»Biography
Birth and Parentage«/b»
William d'Albini or d'Aubigny was the son of William d'Albini and Maud/Matida de Senlis.

William was a minor when his father died: his father's lands were taken i …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny於1173年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel35歲，母親Matilda de Saint-Hilaire41歲。他與Mabel de Chester在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年2月1日在義大利坎帕尼亞卡塞塔凱安洛享年48歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny于1173年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，他的父亲William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel35岁，母亲Matilda de Saint-Hilaire41岁。他与Mabel de Chester在英国英格兰爾切斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年2月1日在意大利坎帕尼亞卡塞塔凱安洛享年48岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: 'the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny was born in 1173, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, was 35 and his mother, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, was 41. He married Mabel de Chester in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 February 1221, in Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Italy, at the age of 48, and was buried in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny est né en 1173, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Mabel de Chester à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 février 1221, à Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny 1173 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel 35 und seine Mutter Matilda de Saint-Hilaire 41. Er hat in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Mabel de Chester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1221 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Italien und wurde in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny è nato il nel 1173 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Mabel de Chester nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1221, nel Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Italia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubignyが1173年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundelは35歳，母Matilda de Saint-Hilaireは41歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでMabel de Chesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年2月1日にイタリアカンプアニアケイセルタケアネロで48歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムウイモンドハム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(이)가 1173년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Saint-Hilaire(은)는 41세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Mabel de Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 2월 1일 이탈리아 캠파니아 카세르타 케이누넬로에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함 윈이몽함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny nasceu em 1173, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel de Chester em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1221, em Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Itália, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny родился в 1173 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel de Chester в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 февраля 1221 г. в местности цеиэнеллоу, кеисирта, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам эбби, вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny nació en 1173, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William d'Aubigny 2nd Earl of Arundel, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Matilda de Saint-Hilaire, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Mabel de Chester en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1221, en Caianello, Caserta, Campania, Italia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
